ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" REAL /* Transaction date in year format */,
  "house_age" REAL /* Age of the house in years */,
  "distance_to_mrt" REAL /* Distance to the nearest MRT station in meters */,
  "num_convenience_stores" INTEGER /* Number of convenience stores nearby */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "price_per_unit_area" REAL /* Price of the unit area in currency */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Specific neighborhood of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (sale, rental) */,
  "tax_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to tax history details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "area_square_meters" REAL /* Area of the property in square meters */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number if it's an apartment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price per unit area in currency */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "features_used" TEXT /* Features used in the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year for more granular data */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price per unit area for the year */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price per unit area for the year */,
  "average_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average number of days properties were on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "locality" TEXT /* More specific locality name (e.g., district) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent works with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text comment for the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "response_comment" TEXT /* Response to the review from the property owner or agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
